class.name: ARFrame
class.brief_description: Contains per-frame AR data including camera pose, anchors, and on iOS, captured images.
class.description: Provides access to the current AR frame's camera, anchors, light estimate, and feature points. On iOS, also provides access to raw camera image planes, person segmentation buffers, and estimated depth data. [b]Platform availability:[/b] - [b]iOS:[/b] Full support including captured image data, segmentation, and depth. - [b]visionOS/macOS:[/b] Camera, anchors, and world mapping status are available. Captured image, segmentation, and depth properties return empty values because the passthrough camera feed is composited by the OS and not accessible to applications.

method.name: display_transform
method.description: Returns a transform that maps normalized image coordinates into display coordinates for the given interface orientation and viewport size.

method.name: get_anchor
method.description: Returns the anchor at [param index] from [member anchors], or [code]null[/code] if the index is out of range.

method.name: get_captured_image_plane_count
method.description: Returns the number of planes in the captured camera image. [b]iOS only.[/b] Returns 0 on visionOS/macOS.

method.name: get_captured_image_plane_data
method.description: Returns the raw pixel data for the given image plane. [b]iOS only.[/b] Returns empty on visionOS/macOS.

method.name: get_captured_image_plane_size
method.description: Returns the dimensions of the given image plane. [b]iOS only.[/b] Returns zero on visionOS/macOS.

method.name: get_captured_image_plane_stride
method.description: Returns the bytes-per-row stride for the given image plane. [b]iOS only.[/b] Returns 0 on visionOS/macOS.

method.name: get_estimated_depth_data
method.description: Returns the estimated depth buffer for person segmentation. [b]iOS 13+ only.[/b] Requires [code skip-lint]PERSON_SEGMENTATION_WITH_DEPTH[/code] frame semantics. Returns empty on visionOS/macOS.

method.name: get_segmentation_buffer
method.description: Returns the person segmentation matte buffer. [b]iOS 13+ only.[/b] Requires [code skip-lint]PERSON_SEGMENTATION[/code] frame semantics. Returns empty on visionOS/macOS.

members.member: The anchors associated with this frame.
The camera sample for this frame.
Size of the captured camera image in pixels. [b]iOS only.[/b] Returns zero on visionOS/macOS.
Size of the estimated depth buffer. [b]iOS 13+ only.[/b] Requires [code skip-lint]PERSON_SEGMENTATION_WITH_DEPTH[/code] frame semantics enabled. Returns zero on visionOS/macOS.
Estimated lighting information for this frame, if available.
The raw feature-point cloud tracked in this frame, if available.

Size of the person segmentation buffer. [b]iOS 13+ only.[/b] Requires [code skip-lint]PERSON_SEGMENTATION[/code] or [code skip-lint]PERSON_SEGMENTATION_WITH_DEPTH[/code] frame semantics enabled. Returns zero on visionOS/macOS.
How complete the world map is for this frame. See [enum WorldMappingStatus].

constants.constant: No world mapping information is available yet.
World mapping has started but remains limited.
ARKit is actively extending the mapped area.
The local environment is well mapped.
